title: molinia caerulea var. altissima
intro: Moliniia caerulea var. altissima, also known as tall purple moor-grass, is a type of grass that is native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its tall purple spikes and slender leaves. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of tall purple moor-grass include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of health concerns.
